outputs.project_binding: synthetic_public_calibration_scope; no source-truth or private project binding asserted
outputs.knowledge_access_event_batch: batch_id=synthetic_batch_001; event_count=3; entries are metadata-only access signals for existing knowledge refs
outputs.normalized_access_event_log: three normalized events with stable synthetic event ids, node refs, access category, recency bucket, outcome state, and confidence hint; no payload text copied
outputs.usage_rollup: observed_access_count=3; one node meets hot retention candidate threshold under supplied synthetic facts; counts remain candidate signals
outputs.retention_label_packet: one retention label candidate: hot; action authority remains downstream policy or owner decision
outputs.link_strength_analysis: one orphan candidate edge identified from metadata-only linkage evidence; no canon relation accepted
outputs.knowledge_accumulation_delta: metadata-only delta records increased observed usage and one candidate linkage gap; not ontology acceptance, canon promotion, or source truth
outputs.graph_update_packet: one candidate graph update packet containing stable synthetic node refs, edge refs, event ids, counts, recency, outcome state, and confidence hint
outputs.orphan_redundancy_candidate_register: one orphan candidate edge registered; no redundancy candidate asserted in the synthetic scenario
outputs.boundary_review_note: public-safe synthetic output only; excludes source text, private packet payloads, advisory answers, credentials, runtime paths, hidden refs, and upstream mutation claims

provenance: public-safe synthetic workflow contract supplied in prompt
synthetic scenario facts supplied in prompt
gaps: no real ledger/register rows supplied, so event ids and refs are synthetic calibration placeholders
retention thresholds and link-strength scoring policy are not specified beyond the synthetic one-hot and one-orphan facts
downstream_handoff: handoff candidate graph_update_packet to later graph or visualization workflow for policy-gated evaluation
handoff retention_label_packet and orphan_redundancy_candidate_register to owner or project policy review before action
boundary_review_note: metadata-only calibration output; not source truth and not canon promotion
no tool use, file edit, runtime path, hidden private evidence, credential, payload copy, or upstream mutation claim is made
no_claims: does not claim production readiness or profile optimization
does not assert accepted retention action, accepted ontology relation, accepted graph mutation, or canonical knowledge promotion
